label: Generative adversarial networks

node.label: Generative adversarial networks
node.definition: A generative adversarial network trains a generator against a discriminator whose feedback pressures generated samples toward the data distribution.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Generative adversarial networks is modeled as depending on Adversarial minimax objectives, Adversarial examples & adversarial training and feeding downstream nodes such as Image generation, editing & design.
examples: atlas downstream link to Image generation, editing & design
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Adversarial minimax objectives, Adversarial examples & adversarial training.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Generative adversarial networks has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Adversarial minimax objectives because Adversarial minimax objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.
In this atlas graph, Generative adversarial networks has a `composes` dependency on Adversarial examples & adversarial training with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Generative adversarial networks has a `specializes` dependency on Convolutional neural networks with `common` strength.
Generative adversarial networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
